heroHeadline: Global Digital Divide: 2.6 Billion Still Offline
heroSubtitle: Starlink expansion to 100+ countries, Amazon Kuiper commercial launch, and UN Global Digital Compact adoption reshape the connectivity landscape — yet the pace of progress is slowing as the hardest-to-reach populations remain offline
footerNote: Data sourced from ITU, GSMA, World Bank, A4AI, SpaceX regulatory filings, and major international research outlets. Contested figures noted with confidence levels.
